summary: A refreshed independent two-pass review found no unresolved delivery finding after the QA sign-off and dossier trail were recorded.

evidence.detail: Approved scope, Gate D sign-off, and delivery decisions align with the QA artifact.

specification_fidelity.residual_risk: Chronological design and plan warnings remain visible without an identified behavior divergence.

evidence.detail: Strict harness recorded all 10 executable criteria as passing.

acceptance_coverage.residual_risk: All 24 acceptance criteria have test evidence.

evidence.detail: The report contract rejects unsafe states, private-output fields, and hidden injection carriers.

code_health.residual_risk: Portable filesystem races are mitigated with post-open identity and containment revalidation.

evidence.detail: Security audit is valid and has no open finding.

runtime_truth.residual_risk: Runtime smoke is not applicable because the delivered surface is a Node CLI and local artifacts only.

evidence.detail: QA documents the bounded filesystem and documentation-freshness residual risks with no blocker.

residual_risk.residual_risk: Residual limits are documented and non-blocking; feature closure remains an explicit human decision.
